title: Event
description: L3 — A domain or integration event: something that happened, emitted by a service and consumed by others. The axis field is `eventType` (not `type`) to avoid colliding with the base-entry `type` discriminator, matching the shipped `decisionType` convention.

eventType.description: domain = within a bounded context; integration = crosses a context/system boundary.

emitter.description: Service or component that emits the event.

consumers.description: Services or components that consume the event.
